action.description: May facilities allow hot work to begin at the site?

context.action_boundary: May facilities allow hot work to begin at the site?
context.anomaly_observed: Contractor insurance and site access are approved, but hot-work authority is a separate boundary.
context.explanation_summary: Verify whether the closure evidence exactly matches the action boundary before execution.

internal_documents.content: Work start WORK-TIE-048 begins hot work for Tierra Mechanical at Site C4 on 2026-06-28.
Site access approval ACCESS-TIE-048 covers Tierra Mechanical at Site C4 for premises entry.
Facilities permit PERMIT-TIE-048 covers Tierra Mechanical, Site C4, general maintenance access, and start date 2026-06-28; hot-work fire watch is not assigned.

policy_documents.content: Hot-work start is complete only when permit evidence matches contractor, site, work type, fire watch assignment, and start date before work begins.
policy_documents.title: Exact source-boundary policy
